organization.name: TradeGo
organization.description: TradeGo is a Singapore-based digital platform for global trade, providing secure and paperless solutions for the exchange of trade documents such as bills of lading. As a Qualified vLEI Issuer (QVI) accredited by GLEIF, TradeGo issues verifiable Legal Entity Identifier (vLEI) credentials to organizations and their authorized representatives, enabling trusted digital identity, compliance, and interoperable data exchange in international trade ecosystems.
